lint.command: bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on when full-file replacement (Create tool) is acceptable for docs-only features versus incremental edits. Current convention is implicit but not codified.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The docs-platform-orchestrator-events worker replaced the entire orchestrator.md because the prior version was garbled. No convention explicitly covers this scenario.

rejectedObservations.observation: EventPublisherService uses an AtomicBoolean mutex (publishingInProgress) in addition to ShedLock. This dual-locking is not documented in .factory/library/.
rejectedObservations.reason: The reviewer noted this is a minor omission in the docs packet itself, not a library gap. The dual-lock behavior is functionally equivalent to ShedLock alone for the purpose of the docs. The reviewer rated it as non-blocking and the docs packet correctly captures the behavioral outcome even if it omits the implementation detail.
